passage.title: A Day with Could Have
passage.text: I could have done this earlier. You could have told me. He could have done this work easily. We could have arrived on time. She could have taken this opportunity. You could have avoided this mistake. They could have won. I could have helped you. He could have told the truth. We could have made it better.
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं यह पहले कर सकता था। तुम मुझे बता सकते थे। वह यह काम आसानी से कर सकता था। हम समय पर पहुँच सकते थे। वह इस मौके का फायदा ले सकती थी। तुम यह गलती avoid कर सकते थे। वे जीत सकते थे। मैं तुम्हारी मदद कर सकता था। वह सच बोल सकता था। हम इसे बेहतर बना सकते थे।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "I could have done..."?
options: I could have helped you.
You could have come earlier.
You could have told me.
I could have done this earlier.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: I could have done this earlier.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "I could have done this earlier."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "You could have told..."?
